description: Tracks all purchase orders from creation through approval, transmission, receiving, and invoicing. Generated automatically by n8n from approved requisitions or POS par-level triggers (Blueprint 5C). Supports tiered approval routing via Slack. Central to three-way matching (PO vs Receiving vs Invoice) in Blueprint 5E.

fields.name: PO Number
fields.description: Unique purchase order number. Auto-generated by n8n workflow (e.g., PO-2026-00142). Referenced by workflows 05 (Receiving) for PO lookup.

fields.name: Vendor
fields.description: Link to the vendor/supplier in the Vendor Master table.

fields.name: Vendor Name
fields.description: Lookup of vendor name for display. Matches vendor_name field used in workflow 05.

fields.name: Contract
fields.description: Link to the applicable contract, if this PO is placed under a contract.

fields.name: Status
fields.description: Current PO lifecycle status. Updated by n8n workflows throughout the procurement cycle.

fields.name: PO Date
fields.description: Date the PO was created.

fields.name: Requested Delivery Date
fields.description: Date delivery is requested/expected. Calculated from vendor lead time.

fields.name: Department
fields.description: Requesting department. Used for GL coding and budget tracking.

fields.name: Source
fields.description: How this PO was generated — auto from POS par-level breach, from a manual requisition, or direct entry.

fields.name: Requisition
fields.description: Link to the originating requisition, if PO was generated from one.

fields.name: Line Items
fields.description: JSON array of PO line items. Each item includes SKU, description, quantity, unit of measure, unit price, extended price, and GL code. Format: [{"line": 1, "sku": "CHK-BRS-001", "description": "Chicken Breast", "quantity": 50, "uom": "lb", "unit_price": 3.85, "extended_price": 192.50, "gl_code": "4010"}]. Matched against delivery items in workflow 05 and invoice line items in three-way match.

fields.name: Subtotal
fields.description: Sum of all line item extended prices before tax.

fields.name: Tax Amount
fields.description: Applicable tax amount.

fields.name: Total Amount
fields.description: Total PO value (subtotal + tax). Determines approval tier: <$500 auto, $500-$2K dept head, $2K-$5K controller, >$5K controller+GM (Blueprint 5C).

fields.name: Approval Tier
fields.description: Calculated approval tier based on total amount per Blueprint 5C thresholds.

options.formula: IF({Total Amount} < 500, 'Auto-Approved', IF({Total Amount} < 2000, 'Dept Head', IF({Total Amount} < 5000, 'Controller', 'Controller + GM')))

fields.name: Approval Status
fields.description: Current state in the approval workflow. Updated by Slack approval interactions.

fields.name: Approved By
fields.description: Name of the person who approved the PO.

fields.name: Approved At
fields.description: Timestamp when the PO was approved.

fields.name: Rejection Reason
fields.description: Reason for rejection, if applicable.

fields.name: Sent To Vendor At
fields.description: Timestamp when the PO was transmitted to the vendor (via email or API).

fields.name: Transmission Method
fields.description: How the PO was sent to the vendor.

fields.name: GL Codes
fields.description: Primary GL account code(s) for this PO. Assigned by n8n from the GL Mapping table based on department + category.

fields.name: Deliveries
fields.description: Link to delivery records for this PO. Used in three-way matching.

fields.name: Invoices
fields.description: Link to invoices matched against this PO. Used in three-way matching.

fields.name: Received Quantity Pct
fields.description: Percentage of ordered items that have been received. Calculated from linked deliveries.

fields.name: Notes
fields.description: Special instructions, delivery notes, or internal comments.

fields.name: Created At
fields.description: Timestamp when the PO record was created.

fields.name: Last Modified
fields.description: Timestamp when the PO record was last updated.

views.name: All POs
views.description: Default view showing all purchase orders.

views.name: Pending Approval
views.description: POs awaiting approval. Primary view for approval workflow.

views.name: Open POs
views.description: Active POs not yet fully received or closed.
views.filter: Status is not Closed AND Status is not Cancelled

views.name: Awaiting Delivery
views.description: POs sent to vendor but not yet received.
views.filter: Status is 'Sent to Vendor' OR Status is 'Acknowledged'

views.name: By Vendor
views.description: Grouped by vendor for spend analysis.

views.name: By Department
views.description: Grouped by department for budget tracking.
